justification: The diff correctly migrates Spring Boot 2.x to 3.x (Jakarta EE namespace, Security DSL, springdoc artifact) and updates Java version to 21, but doesn't leverage any Java 21-specific idioms (e.g., records, pattern matching, virtual threads) beyond the baseline migration. All deprecated patterns (javax.*, EnableGlobalMethodSecurity, antMatchers) are cleanly replaced with modern equivalents without spurious churn.
